paper_focus.title: Hydrogen-enhanced microbanding in an austenitic FeMnAlC low-density steel: Effect on hydrogen embrittlement resistance
paper_focus.research_objective: To elucidate the effect of hydrogen on dislocation structures and deformation mechanisms in an austenitic Fe30Mn6.5Al0.3C low-density steel and to establish the role of hydrogen-induced microbanding in the steel's hydrogen embrittlement resistance.
